title: 43rd Battalion
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{MilitaryUnit |image= |name=43rd Battalion
"Killer Aiwha" |type=[[Infantry/Legends|Infantry]]{{InsiderCite|69|Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 14:9:01}} |formation=[[Battalion/Legends|Battalion]] |commander= |second= |staff= |subunit= |strength=[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone troopers]] |vehicles= |headquarters= |location=[[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] |battles=[[Battle of Jabiim]] |formed= |founded= |fragmented=[[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''{{CSWECite|I|249|43rd 'Killer Aiwha' Battalion}} Jabiim |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] }} {{Quote|The initial assault claimed 32 clones, all from the 43rd "Killer-Aiwha" Battalion, and there are three confirmed Jedi deaths: Dalnus Cam, Sana-Jis Ilowa, and Rallcema Bylissura.|HoloNet News Core Edition report|}} The '''43rd Battalion''', also known as the '''Killer Aiwha''', was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], the 43rd participated in the [[Battle of Jabiim]] and was stationed in [[Shelter Base]], a Republic outpost on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. During the battle, the battalion was completely wiped out when the Separatist forces attacked Shelter Base. The battle later ended with a Republic defeat, as the Republic suffered severe casualties. ==Description== The 43rd Battalion was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] conflict between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. The battalion was nicknamed "Killer Aiwha," named after a [[Aiwha/Legends|flying creature]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]].{{DB|creature|aiwha|aiwha}} ==History== [[File:SWREP55-FC.jpg|thumb|right|220px|The Galactic Republic attempted to reconquer Jabiim]] In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], the planet [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] seceded from the Republic, resulting in a task force being sent to [[Battle of Jabiim|reconquer]] the world.''[[Star Wars: Republic: The Battle of Jabiim]]'' After landing on the planet, the 43rd joined the Republic force and was stationed at an outpost called [[Shelter Base]] while other forces of the Grand Army moved against three Separatist holdings. Separatist [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Alto Stratus]] launched a counterattack on the insufficiently defended Shelter Base. During a stormy [[Standard day/Legends|night]], the Separatist [[Troop/Legends|troops]] used [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|hailfire droids]] to bombard the base. Thirty-two members of the 43rd, as well as three [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], were [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the attack, and the battalion was completely wiped out. The Battle of Jabiim continued to rage for [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] on the planet, and in the end the Republic troops were forced to retreat from Jabiim after suffering enormous casualties. ==Behind the scenes== The 43rd Battalion was first mentioned in ''[[Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 14:9:01]]'', an [[in-universe]] [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] issue published in [[Star Wars Insider 69|''Star Wars Insider'' 69]], which was published on [[June 27]], [[2003]].{{SWArchive|url=community/news/2003/06/news20030620.html|text=Clone War Details in ''Insider'' #69}} The issue was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]]. ==Appearances== *{{InsiderCite|69|Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 14:9:01}} {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=43. Bataillon |tr=43. Tabur }} [[Category:Grand Army of the Republic battalions]]
